title: webhook — subscribed events
description: Subscribes to foundation lifecycle + tenants suspension + versioning sunset events.

listeners.purpose: Load WebhookRegistry + WebhookDestinationRegistry from compiled cache at boot. Cold-cache rebuild uses build-time compiler artefact.

When a module boots, walk its declared classes for #[AsWebhookEvent] + #[AsWebhookDestination] attributes and register with the respective registries. Complements build-time compiler for dev-mode hot module loading.

Transitions every active subscription for the tenant to state=disabled with reason=tenant_suspended. Resumes are manual on unsuspension — tenant admins must actively re-enable each subscription to prove they've reviewed integrations.
On unsuspension, notify tenant admin that N subscriptions were auto-disabled during suspension + require manual re-enable. Does NOT auto-resume.

Dispatches AutoUpgradePinnedSubscriptionsJob — for each subscription with api_version = sunset slug: if migration_target_slug set, upgrade + fire WebhookSubscriptionUpgraded; else, disable with reason=api_version_sunset + fire WebhookSubscriptionDisabled + notify admin.
Registry change may unblock previously-failing chains. Invalidate the per-subscription transformer cache so next dispatch re-resolves.
